The Central Depositories Act, 2000
An Act of Parliament to facilitate the establishment, operation and
regulation of central depositories, to provide for the immobilisation
and eventual dematerialisation of, and dealings in, securities deposited
therewith in Kenya, and for connected purposes
ENACTED by the Parliament of Kenya, as follows-
